name: NextGen Etch Process Automation
description: Automate wafer etch process control using ML-based anomaly detection to reduce defect rates and improve equipment uptime.

name: Employee Knowledge Graph Platform
description: Build a Microsoft Fabric-powered ontology and knowledge graph indexing all employee skills, documents, and org relationships.

name: Global HR Analytics Dashboard
description: Deliver a real-time HR analytics suite covering headcount trends, attrition prediction, and talent gap analysis across all regions.

name: Semiconductor Yield Improvement Initiative
description: Cross-functional project to identify root causes of below-spec yield using statistical process control and AI-driven root cause analysis.

name: Procurement Cost Optimization
description: Leverage AI-driven spend analysis and supplier benchmarking to reduce procurement costs by 12% within fiscal year.

name: Private AI Foundry Integration
description: Connect internal engineering systems to Azure AI Foundry via private endpoints and APIM gateway for secure model access.

name: Safety Compliance Digitization
description: Replace paper-based safety audit processes with a digital platform backed by Cosmos DB and document intelligence parsing.

name: Fab Equipment Digital Twin
description: Create real-time digital twins of fabrication equipment using IoT telemetry and Azure Synapse analytics for predictive maintenance.

name: Talent Mobility & Reskilling Program
description: Identify internal talent redeployment opportunities using skill ontology matching and recommend reskilling paths via AI copilot.

name: OneLake Semantic Layer Rollout
description: Standardize enterprise data products on OneLake with governed semantic models and certified dataset publishing for all business units.

name: Global Supply Chain Visibility
description: Integrate supplier EDI feeds, logistics APIs, and ERP data into a unified supply chain monitoring dashboard with AI alerting.

name: Plasma Process ML Optimization
description: Apply reinforcement learning to continuously tune plasma etch recipe parameters for optimal uniformity and selectivity.

name: Internal Copilot for Engineering
description: Deploy a Microsoft Copilot Studio agent grounded on internal engineering documentation, spec sheets, and failure analysis reports.

name: Finance Reporting Modernization
description: Migrate legacy Finance reporting from on-prem SSRS to Power BI with live Synapse connections and certified KPI definitions.

name: Cleanroom Environmental Monitoring
description: Deploy IoT-based environmental sensors across cleanroom facilities and build a real-time alerting platform for airborne particle thresholds.

name: Document Intelligence Parsing Pipeline
description: Automate extraction and classification of engineering documents using Azure AI Document Intelligence with confidence-scored output to Cosmos DB.

name: Enterprise Search & Knowledge Retrieval
description: Implement Azure AI Search over OneLake and Cosmos DB to enable semantic search across all employee knowledge artifacts and project content.

name: Sustainability & Carbon Footprint Tracking
description: Build an ESG data platform tracking energy consumption, water usage, and carbon emissions across all Lam Research manufacturing sites.

name: Wafer Metrology Data Lake
description: Centralize wafer metrology measurements from multiple fab tools into a governed OneLake data lake with lineage tracking and quality gates.

name: Workforce Planning & Scenario Modelling
description: Build a scenario modelling tool enabling HR and Finance to simulate headcount growth, skill gap evolution, and budget impact for 3-year plans.
